steps: Log in to your Bitly account (or create a free account at https://app.bitly.com/)
On the API settings page, enter your Bitly account password in the field provided
Copy the access token immediately — it will not be shown again once you leave the page

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Bitly OAuth access token used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Free plan available with basic link shortening and limited analytics
The access token is shown only once — save it securely before leaving the page
The token is sent as: Authorization: Bearer <token>
Free accounts are rate-limited; check https://dev.bitly.com/ for current limits
Multiple access tokens can be created — see https://support.bitly.com/hc/en-us/articles/16731008226445

test_endpoint.description: Returns the authenticated user's account details
